description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a narrow neck and a slightly flared, squared-off mouth. The surface is predominantly a mottled brown with a glossy, glazed finish, suggesting it is made of ceramic or stoneware. The upper portion of the bottle, including the neck and shoulder, features a lighter, speckled brown coloration, while the main body is a darker, more uniform brown. There is visible text embossed vertically along one side of the bottle, adding a distinctive detail. The base shows minor scuffing and wear, indicating some use or age. The bottle appears solid and robust, suitable for holding liquids or as a decorative item.
description: A tall, glossy brown ceramic bottle with a narrow neck, mottled surface, and embossed vertical text. The finish is shiny and the bottle shows minor wear at the base.
description_view_0: This view highlights the vertical embossed text on the bottle's side and the glossy, mottled brown surface.
description_view_1: The bottle's back is visible, showing a smoother, darker brown area with minor scuffing near the base and no visible text.
description_view_2: This side view displays the bottle's cylindrical shape and the transition from the lighter neck to the darker body, with a consistent glossy finish.
description_view_3: The front shows the bottle's rounded form, mottled brown surface, and the subtle transition in color from neck to body, with no visible text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Vertical embossed text on one side, color matches the bottle, no distinct logo or branding.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Minor scuffing and wear at the base, no major damage or deformation visible.
